div1.entryFree: Chaff, the husks of corn separated by thrashing: Merch. I, 1, 117. Wint. IV, 4, 630. H4B IV, 1, 195. Cor. V, 1, 26. Cor. V, 1, 26 Figuratively: how much honour picked from the c. and ruin of the times, Merch. II, 9, 48. where my c. and corn shall fly asunder, H8 V, 1, 111. asses, fools, dolts! c. and bran! Troil. I, 2, 262.
